candidates.title: Integrating AWS API MCP Server with Amazon Quick using Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime
candidates.summary: This post shows you how to use Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime with Model Context Protocol (MCP) support to connect Amazon Quick with AWS services through the AWS API MCP Server, creating a conversational AI assistant that translates natural language into AWS Command Line Interface (AWS CLI) commands, without the need to switch between tools during critical moments.

candidates.title: OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner
candidates.summary: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with Codex recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment.

candidates.title: Intelligent radiology workflow optimization with AI agents
candidates.summary: Many healthcare organizations report that traditional worklist systems rely on rigid rules that ignore critical context, radiologist specialization, current workload, fatigue levels, and case complexity. This creates a persistent challenge: radiologists cherry-pick easier, higher-value cases while avoiding complex studies, leading to diagnostic delays and increased costs. Research across 62 hospitals analyzing 2.2 million studies found […]

candidates.title: Trump delays AI security executive order, saying language ‘could have been a blocker’
candidates.summary: President Trump delayed signing an executive order that would have required pre-release government security reviews of AI models, citing dissatisfaction with the order's language.

candidates.title: We tried Google’s AI glasses and they’re almost there
candidates.summary: Google demoed prototype Android XR glasses that overlay Gemini-powered translation, navigation, and other information directly into your field of view.

candidates.title: How Virgin Atlantic ships faster with Codex
candidates.summary: How Virgin Atlantic used Codex to ship its revamped mobile app on a fixed holiday travel deadline, reaching near-total unit test coverage and zero P1 defects.
